subcodes.first_line: O thou of wondrous character! This is the springtide of divine bestowal, and the spiritual spring hath pitched its tent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بدیع الاخلاق موسم بیع الهی است و بهار روحانی خیمه و خرگاه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
